highlights.summary: Adds optional glucose forecast display to the Live Activity (lock screen) widget and the supporting data/path plumbing, plus a new setting to toggle sending/displaying forecasts.
highlights.userFacingImpact: A new "Display Glucose Forecasts" setting (default OFF) appears under Settings > Notifications > Live Activity. When enabled, the Live Activity chart can show Oref forecasts as either a cone or per-type lines (mode follows Forecast Display Type). Forecast payloads were adjusted to be payload-safe (mutually exclusive cone vs lines, capped length). The PR requests more testers and code review before wide deployment.

sources.title: gordolio/Trio#1194: Live Activity: Adding glucose forecast
nightscout/Trio#1194: Live Activity: Adding glucose forecast
feat: Add glucose predictions to lock screen live activity chart
refactor: Remove forecast lines option from Live Activity, keep cone only
feat: Re-add forecast lines mode with payload-safe mutually exclusive data
refactor: Use named asset colors for forecast lines, clean up ForEach
feat: Add Display Glucose Forecasts toggle to Live Activity settings
fix: Correct forecast line colors and visibility in Live Activity widget
fix: Clamp forecast Y-axis max to chart threshold in Live Activity widget

highlights.summary: Adds EversenseKit as a Git submodule and integrates Eversense CGM support (driver registration, UI option, and framework embedding) into the app.
highlights.userFacingImpact: Users will see a new "Eversense" CGM option and the app will include the EversenseKit framework to support Eversense sensors. The PR notes the driver supports various Eversense sensor models and mentions optional debug-data upload; the change is in Draft and a few crashes are being investigated, so review and testing are advised before release.

items.summary: Adds optional glucose forecast display to the Live Activity (lock screen) widget and the supporting data/path plumbing, plus a new setting to toggle sending/displaying forecasts.
items.userFacingImpact: A new "Display Glucose Forecasts" setting (default OFF) appears under Settings > Notifications > Live Activity. When enabled, the Live Activity chart can show Oref forecasts as either a cone or per-type lines (mode follows Forecast Display Type). Forecast payloads were adjusted to be payload-safe (mutually exclusive cone vs lines, capped length). The PR requests more testers and code review before wide deployment.

items.summary: Adds EversenseKit as a Git submodule and integrates Eversense CGM support (driver registration, UI option, and framework embedding) into the app.
items.userFacingImpact: Users will see a new "Eversense" CGM option and the app will include the EversenseKit framework to support Eversense sensors. The PR notes the driver supports various Eversense sensor models and mentions optional debug-data upload; the change is in Draft and a few crashes are being investigated, so review and testing are advised before release.

items.summary: Adds an explicit "initiating" bolus state and wires it through models and views so the bolus progress UI can show an initiating phase between command acceptance and progress.
items.userFacingImpact: The bolus progress UI will show an "initiating" state when a bolus has been accepted but not yet begun progressing, representing short device delays (noted ~5s for Tandem Mobi). The supplied changes are interface-only in the diffs; no dosing logic changes are evident.

sources.title: feat: add initiating state to TreatmentView

items.summary: Enable text selection for submodule keys/values and add a copy-to-clipboard control for app version/build/branch+SHA with a brief toast and haptic feedback.
items.userFacingImpact: Users can select and copy submodule names and SHAs. A new copy control copies the full app version/build/branch+SHA to the clipboard and shows a temporary "copied" toast plus haptic feedback. Changes are limited to the settings UI.

items.summary: Series of CI/dev commits that increment the internal APP_DEV_VERSION development constant in Config.xcconfig across multiple bumps.
items.userFacingImpact: These commits only update the internal APP_DEV_VERSION development identifier in build configuration files and do not show functional or runtime behavior changes in the supplied diffs. Human review is recommended to confirm there are no downstream effects.

includedPullRequests.title: Feat: Bolus initiating
includedPullRequests.body:
(duplicate of #1206)
(provided feedback from previous PR https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1206#issuecomment-4702981172)

This PR updates the bolus progress view to show to the user that the bolus is initiating.
This is required for the upcomming TandemKit driver, because the Tandem Mobi takes ~5s between accepting a bolus command and actually progressing the bolus.

We could also add the last bolus state: canceling. But this is not done in this PR

Demo video:

<video src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/2c22ff5c-d203-4305-bb1f-c64019df2192" />

includedPullRequests.title: Live Activity: Adding glucose forecast
includedPullRequests.body: New feature adding glucose forecast to the Live Activity lock screen widget. Quick walkthrough: - The feature is controlled by a setting under Settings - Notifications - Live Activity - Default setting is off - Forecast display type (cone or lines) is controlled by the same setting as the Main chart | Setting, default is off | Setting explanation | Example with prediction lines | Example with cone | |--------|--------|--------|--------| | | | | | Runs fine on my test device and on my live device, but needs more testers and a code review.

includedPullRequests.title: Feature: EversenseKit
includedPullRequests.body:
The PR will add the EversenseKit driver to Trio.
I still need to investigate a few crashes from Joanne, thus it stays on Draft for now.

The driver is compatible with the Eversense E3 (both 90 days and 180 days) and the Eversense 365.
It has support for uploading directly to the Eversense DMS including debug data for Eversense Support.
This is an opt-out feature
